description: Sketch is a macOS-based digital design and interface design product with collaboration, prototyping, developer handoff, and workspace management features. It also offers enterprise identity integration through SSO and SCIM provisioning.
summary: Sketch exposes a local MCP server, a bundled macOS CLI (`sketchtool`), an in-app JavaScript/plugin API, and a tenant-specific SCIM HTTP API authenticated with a SCIM token.
